gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 found that Protocol _abc_impl cache identity caused clean-import protocol aliases to fall back to source-default protocol classes. I skipped _abc_impl in the class fingerprint, added protocol identity assertions, reran verification, and re-review returned no findings.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_databricks_runs.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_release_bundle.py -q
what_changed: Loaded document_kv_cache.databricks_runs source defaults in the legacy wrapper before compatibility cloning.
Preserved clean-import public protocol identity and DatabricksWorkspaceConfig subclassing while falling back to source-default classes after pre-import public class replacement.
Added regression tests for pre-import public helper monkeypatches, pre-import public config class replacement, and clean protocol identity.
why: The legacy Databricks wrapper must remain safe under import-order monkeypatches without regressing public compatibility for normal document-kv-cache imports.
